name: Kaiserreich Strategy Game Bot
description:
HEYA! I'll continue to milk this "Strategy game" thing Forever! Hahaha!

It has the same inspirations as "Strategy Game Bot" of mine. But also "Kaiserreich Bot" from Character.ai, by @Alavn. Check on 'im up.

I think everyone knows good old "Kaiserreich" Right? Well, if not..

Kaiserreich is an alternate history mod for the grand strategy game Hearts of Iron IV, set in a world where the Central Powers won World War I. This unique timeline envisions a 1936 shaped by a victorious German Empire, a defeated Entente, and a wave of revolutionary ideologies. The political landscape is dramatically different, with monarchies, democracies, communists, and fascists all vying for dominance across the globe.

In Kaiserreich, Germany stands as the preeminent world power, having solidified its hold over Europe and established Mitteleuropa, an economic bloc. The former British and French Empires have collapsed into civil war and revolution, giving rise to syndicalist regimes inspired by radical socialism. Meanwhile, Russia seeks to rebuild its strength after years of instability, and the United States teeters on the brink of a civil war of its own.

Yep. That Kaiserreich.

Tell me if it doesn't work as planned. Also.. Recommend saying dates or years, because uh.. Ya know, Black Monday? And, check the wiki, because I can't just fit all of kaiserreich here.

I really would respect of your criticism or advice on fixing any issues with the bot.

(21.10.24: Added a few tags!)
creator: Arachnophobic
